items.title: [正面] Morimens is a rarity for gachas: in terms of gamep...
items.summary:
Morimens is a rarity for gachas: in terms of gameplay and overall quality it could easily stand on part of above most of normal tactical RPGs. At the core it is a deckbuilder, like Slay the Spire, but the quality all around is excellent - music, artstyle, you name it.

Pros:
+ A lovecraftian story that does not rely on cheap gross-outs in the depiction of supernatural. Artstyle is ethereal and sublime, which makes various horrors and tragedies you're about to experience even more poignant.
+ Excellent music.
+ Actually very good story. There is the usual gacha setup, where the player avatar is the most awesome guy ever, but the fact that he has unique powers and role is actually addressed as the story progresses. I was actually surprised by some plot turns rather than seeing them a mile away.
+ There is a wealth of endgame content. Usual stuff like tryhard dungeons, plus new difficulties for normal stages.
+ Running through the story does not require paying. In fact, it is one of those games where a f2p player can reasonably be expected to collect most of the characters. Similarly, you aren't screwed forever by wrong initial choices (though reading a beginners' guide is still recommended, because the gameplay is fairly complex). Whaling is only necessary if you want maxed out parties for tacking endgame content.

Maybes:
=Though it now has both autobattle and sweep function, Morimens generally requires you to engage your brain in remotely challenging content.
=The story can get pretty dark. Don't expect perfect happy endings. 

Cons:
- Still a gacha, constantly nudging you to pay by reminding how much stuff you're going to miss otherwise.

items.title: [正面] 5771在克系这条路上走了很远，目前市场上还没有发现真正的竞品。刚去逝的二位，龟笼巢只能说是新国潮，...
items.summary:
5771在克系这条路上走了很远，目前市场上还没有发现真正的竞品。刚去逝的二位，龟笼巢只能说是新国潮，新月则应该算新怪谈，论克味儿都不如5771正。

所以游戏的优点是很明显的：
优秀的设定集，人设，原画，音乐，以上这些在游戏中得到了很好的统一，就是我经常说的风格一致，所有角色人设逻辑自洽，不会出现任天堂大乱斗，剧情和音乐也是。我认为这一点对于一个作品来说是非常非常重要的加分项。
再特别吹一下设定集，很多游戏的原画等没有得到重视，但5771很聪明的把这些作为游戏体验的重要一部分直接开放给玩家，优秀的设定集极大程度上丰富了世界观和游玩体验，克味十足的原画集也给了我很大的震撼（出原画设定集应该能大卖？）。毕竟二游卖角色归根结底还是要靠卖剧情。

说完再说缺点：
首先是二游运营上的常见逼氪问题，这个游戏可以某种程度上认为是富哥游戏，几乎大部分角色需要抽2-3启才能是完全体，而游戏最核心的爬塔玩法融灾禁区是游戏中重要的提升等级上限道具最主要的出产地，每期有5关，每关需要4个角色，也就是要求你有至少20个成型角色才能比较容易的吃到低保，而这20个角色中有一半是每期变幻的，这对BOX有相当高的要求。可能有人会认为这属于终局玩法，适合老玩家，但这只是新玩家打低保层（350上下）的基础需求，而且大部分角色是限定，且有2-3启要求。如果你是新入坑的非重氪玩家，追赶进度是一件非常吃力的事，我能想到你所能做的，只有氪金。

items.title: [正面] Cosmic horror time! Really enjoying the story so f...
items.summary:
Cosmic horror time! Really enjoying the story so far, just finished chapter 3, the wip english translation isn't as rough as I was expecting, serves fine enough 👍 CG's are sparce but beautiful, and the card gameplay is neat with a little rougelike twist during the combat segments! 

Also the gacha system is set up for 5 pulls instead of standard 10 pulls, and they're very generous with rewards, nothing as satisfying as pushing the big pull button consecutively without being a whale

items.title: [正面] Great game, whale or no whale, it keeps you engage...
items.summary:
Great game, whale or no whale, it keeps you engaged. 
The team shares a life bar, but individually has power for special of its own. 
There different factions, and not all are meant for free to play.
